name: Old Fashioned Lemon Chess Pie (Eastern North Carolina Recipe)
recipeIngredient: Juice of two large lemons (about 1/3 cup) or Juice of three small lemons (about 1/2 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the cornmeal or flour and sugar in a bowl.
2. Gradually add the lemon juice and melted butter to the dry ingredients. Stir until well combined.
3. Beat in the eggs one at a time, mixing gently after each addition.
4. Pour the batter into a prepared crust.
5. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit for about one hour, or until the mixture sets and turns golden brown. Adjust the amount of lemon juice to taste if desired.
